title: The Young and the Damned
writer: Luis Alcoriza, Max Aub, Luis Buñuel
actors: Alfonso Mejía, Roberto Cobo, Estela Inda
plot: A group of juvenile delinquents live a violent and crime-filled life in the festering slums of Mexico City, as the morals of young Pedro are gradually corrupted and destroyed by the others.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 12 wins & 6 nominations total
